description_long: This object is an open book with its pages fanned out and a soft, ethereal mist or smoke rising from the center, giving it a magical or enchanted appearance. The book's cover is a muted brown with a subtle border, and the pages are a pale, almost glowing blue-white, suggesting a sense of mystery or fantasy. The mist appears to spiral upward, becoming more diffuse as it rises, and adds a dynamic, otherworldly element to the otherwise static book. The book is relatively thin, with a visible spine and a slight curvature to the open pages. There are no visible illustrations, text, or publisher markings on the cover or spine. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, with the mist being the most prominent feature.
description: An open book with pale blue-white pages and a magical mist spiraling upward from its center, set against a plain background. The cover is brown and unadorned, emphasizing the ethereal effect of the rising mist.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the back, showing the brown cover and the mist rising from the open pages.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front, displaying the open pages and the central mist plume most prominently.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the back again, similar to view 0, with the mist and fanned pages visible.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the front, like view 1, with the open pages and mist clearly visible.
